system.description: Focus on a plant nearby and roll [quality].

outcomes.success: you can rapidly grow the plant in a manner unbound by its normal biology (houseplants can grow vines, become trees, etc.) This plant can bind a single target or make an area roughly the size of a single room difficult to pass through. Alternatively, you may affect any simple change or natural effect that an overgrown plant of the species in question could do (bend into a specific shape, bear fruit, discharge a protective liquid, etc.) It is fully pliable to your will.
outcomes.failure: nature hears you but doesn’t listen. The living things around you, not just plants, gobble up your Resonance hungrily and grow in dangerous and obvious ways.
outcomes.eachplus3:
you may choose one:
  • Wrap: Bind an additional target.
  • Grow: Expand the area by the size of another room.
  • Fruit: The plant can drop a deadly fruit of your design onto a bound target for 2 Harm.
  • Thorn: The area becomes sharp and dangerous, dealing 1 Harm to anyone who tries to move through it.
  • Blossom: The plant takes on a beautiful appearance and smell, powerfully alluring to anyone who can see or smell it.
